name: Fee Outstanding Report
query:
SELECT si.customer AS "Student:Link/Custom Student:150",
       si.customer_name AS "Student Name:Data:150",
       si.posting_date AS "Invoice Date:Date:100",
       si.due_date AS "Due Date:Date:100",
       si.grand_total AS "Total Amount:Currency:100",
       si.outstanding_amount AS "Outstanding:Currency:120",
       DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), si.due_date) AS "Overdue Days:Int:80",
       si.status AS "Status:Data:80"
FROM `tabSales Invoice` si
WHERE si.outstanding_amount > 0
  AND si.docstatus = 1
ORDER BY si.due_date ASC
